title: Should you sign your kids up for Trump Accounts? Four things to consider
author: Stephan Bisaha
content:
Families can still benefit even if their children aren't eligible for the free $1,000 contribution from the federal government.

(Image credit: TIMOTHY A. CLARY)
summary: Families can still benefit even if their children aren't eligible for the free $1,000 contribution from the federal government.

title: Supreme Court financial disclosures reveal how their books add to their income
author: Nina Totenberg
content:
The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the justices' gifts, travel and personal lives.

(Image credit: Mario Tama)
summary: The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the justices' gifts, travel and personal lives.

title: New U.S. passports with Trump's image are available. Here's how to get (or avoid) one
author: Michele Kelemen
content:
The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment.

(Image credit: Michele Kelemen)
summary: The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment.

title: Appeals court denies Trump's request to halt removal of his name from the Kennedy Center
author: Anastasia Tsioulcas
content:
The D.C. circuit appeals court denied all of President Trump's arguments that sought to stop the removal of his name from the Washington, D.C., arts institution.

(Image credit: Alex Wroblewski)
summary: The D.C. circuit appeals court denied all of President Trump's arguments that sought to stop the removal of his name from the Washington, D.C., arts institution.

title: Tensions with Iran add fresh uncertainty to an already shaky global economy
author: Scott Horsley
content:
Crude oil prices jumped and stock prices fell after President Trump declared an end to the ceasefire with Iran, adding fresh uncertainty to an already shaky outlook for the global economy.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
summary: Crude oil prices jumped and stock prices fell after President Trump declared an end to the ceasefire with Iran, adding fresh uncertainty to an already shaky outlook for the global economy.

title: Family of Nolan Wells, Black teen found dead off Mississippi island, retains lawyer Ben Crump
author: The Associated Press
content: The body of 18-year-old Nolan Xavier Wells was found Monday off Horn Island, Mississippi. That's where he was last seen with friends Saturday. Crump says the family is seeking answers.
summary: The body of 18-year-old Nolan Xavier Wells was found Monday off Horn Island, Mississippi. That's where he was last seen with friends Saturday. Crump says the family is seeking answers.

title: Inspiration for Trump's arch was sparked long before the design was first approved
author: Chiara Eisner
content:
The design process for new memorials shouldn't be fast-tracked or dictated by a select few, experts say. But a small group of people close to President Trump played an outsized role in the arch's quick approvals.

(Image credit: Harrison Design)
summary: The design process for new memorials shouldn't be fast-tracked or dictated by a select few, experts say. But a small group of people close to President Trump played an outsized role in the arch's quick approvals.

title: The IOC clears the way for Russian athletes to return to Olympic competition
author: Charles Maynes
content:
The International Olympic Committee decision effectively overturns a decade-long ban on Russian athletes from international sport imposed due to a state-sponsored doping scandal and Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine.

(Image credit: Pavel Bednyakov)
summary: The International Olympic Committee decision effectively overturns a decade-long ban on Russian athletes from international sport imposed due to a state-sponsored doping scandal and Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine.

title: Do you know where your birth certificate is? Journalist warns of new voting barriers
author: Tonya Mosley
content:
The rules of the midterms are being rewritten, from redistricting to campaign money. Mother Jones journalist Ari Berman explains why President Trump seems "obsessed with the mechanics of voting."

(Image credit: Mike Stewart)
summary: The rules of the midterms are being rewritten, from redistricting to campaign money. Mother Jones journalist Ari Berman explains why President Trump seems "obsessed with the mechanics of voting."

title: Here are the 2026 Emmy nominations
author: Linda Holmes
content: Liza Colón-Zayas and Jeff Hiller presented the nominees on Wednesday morning. The Pitt led all shows with 25 nominations, followed closely by the final season of Hacks with 24.
summary: Liza Colón-Zayas and Jeff Hiller presented the nominees on Wednesday morning. The Pitt led all shows with 25 nominations, followed closely by the final season of Hacks with 24.
